parameters.jsonBody:
{
    "title_sv": "Testevent via n8n",
    "title_en": "Test event via n8n",
    "title_ru": "Тестовое событие через n8n",
    "title_so": "Tijaabo dhacdo n8n",
    "title_ar": "فعالية تجريبية عبر n8n",
    "title_uk": "Тестова подія через n8n",
    "description_sv": "Det här är ett testevenemang som skapats via n8n.",
    "description_en": "This is a test event created via n8n.",
    "description_ru": "Это тестовое событие, созданное через n8n.",
    "description_so": "Tani waa dhacdo tijaabo ah oo laga sameeyay n8n.",
    "description_ar": "هذه فعالية تجريبية تم إنشاؤها عبر n8n.",
    "description_uk": "Це тестова подія, створена через n8n.",
    "date": "2025-12-01",
    "time": "18:00",
    "city": "Flen",
    "location": "Flen centrum",
    "link": "https://visitflen.se/evenemang",
    "ticket_link": null,
    "category": "music",
    "event_type": "indoor",
    "age_group": "all",
    "is_free": true,
    "price": null,
    "is_kids_friendly": true,
    "is_sponsored": false,
    "sponsor_id": null,
    "approval_status": "pending",
   
    "image": null
  }

={
  "title_sv": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.title_sv || "") }},
  "description_sv": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.description_sv || "") }},

  "title_en": {{ JSON.stringify($('DeepL EN').item.json.translations?.[0]?.text || "") }},
  "description_en": {{ JSON.stringify($('DeepL EN').item.json.translations?.[1]?.text || "") }},

  "title_ru": {{ JSON.stringify($('DeepL RU').item.json.translations?.[0]?.text || "") }},
  "description_ru": {{ JSON.stringify($('DeepL RU').item.json.translations?.[1]?.text || "") }},

  "title_ar": {{ JSON.stringify($('DeepL AR').item.json.translations?.[0]?.text || "") }},
  "description_ar": {{ JSON.stringify($('DeepL AR').item.json.translations?.[1]?.text || "") }},

  "title_uk": {{ JSON.stringify($('DeepL UK').item.json.translations?.[0]?.text || "") }},
  "description_uk": {{ JSON.stringify($('DeepL UK').item.json.translations?.[1]?.text || "") }},

  "title_so": {{ JSON.stringify($('Google Translate SO').item.json.data?.translations?.[0]?.translatedText || "") }},
  "description_so": {{ JSON.stringify($('Google Translate SO').item.json.data?.translations?.[1]?.translatedText || "") }},

  "date": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.date || "") }},
  "time": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.time || "") }},
  "city": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.location || "") }},
  
  "location": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.location || "") }},
  
  "link": {{ JSON.stringify("https://visitflen.se" + ($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.link || "")) }},
  "category": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.category || "other") }},
  "event_type": "other",
  
  "age_group": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.category === 'kids' ? "kids" : "all") }},

  "is_free": true,
  "source": "Evenemang Flen",
  "approval_status": "approved"
}
